atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Insert Tailwind's base, components, or utilities layers.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inline existing Tailwind utility classes into a custom CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Register custom styles into Tailwind's base, components, or utilities layer.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Load a specific Tailwind config file for this stylesheet.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Expand a named Tailwind breakpoint into a media query.
